subcodes.first_line: Hearken unto My call from the right hand of the Throne, the station which God hath made the Dawning-Place of His Revelation, the Dayspring of His inspiration and the Manifestation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان استمع ندائی عن یمین العرش مقر الذی جعله الله مطلع وحیه و مشرق الهامه و مظهر
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @confidence; courage; faith in teaching the Cause, @call to action
